query: Swap the Rodin3D generation model from Rodin Large to Rodin Fusion and ensure all downstream nodes (detailing, smoothing, preview) remain connected and functional.

desired.outcome: The generation backbone is replaced and the modified pipeline still produces a previewable 3D model.
desired.quality: The workflow has no disconnected or missing nodes, all original stages (detailing, smoothing, preview) function with the new model.

_tags.author_rationale: This demands understanding the pipeline's structure and modifying a core component without breaking the rest, a genuine big adjustment.
